targets.kyc_cycle_p50_hours.description: KYC cycle time p50 target in hours. Docs approved within this window are on-track.

targets.percent_automated.description: Target percentage of documents classified by OCR/AI without manual indexing.

targets.ai_confidence.description: Target percentage of documents whose AI extraction confidence is at or above the confidence threshold.

targets.confidence_threshold.description: Minimum AI confidence score (0–1) that counts as a high-confidence extraction. Drives the AI confidence tile. Default: 0.7.

targets.expiring_30d_alert.description: Number of documents expiring within 30 days that triggers an at-risk status. Default: 50.

targets.expiring_30d_breach.description: Number of documents expiring within 30 days that triggers a breach status. Default: 100.

targets.audit_failures_alert.description: Audit failure count YTD that triggers an at-risk status. Default: 5.

targets.audit_failures_breach.description: Audit failure count YTD that triggers a breach status. Default: 20.

refresh_interval_seconds.description: How often the dashboard auto-refreshes KPI data (seconds). Default: 300.

default_timeframe.description: Default timeframe shown when a user first loads the dashboard.

default_comparator.description: Default comparator mode for tile deltas.

tile_catalog.description: Ordered list of tiles available to all users. Admins can remove tiles from the catalog to hide them tenant-wide.
